titles.title: I've Got the Love of Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The wind blows, but i can't see it The sunshines bright, but can't touch it Rain drops, but i can't count it Dew just fall, but i can't hold them at all.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've got the love of Jesus I've got it in my soul He's love for me Has wash and cleanse and made me whole Nature has a story untold, I've got the love of Jesus, The love of Jesus in my soul.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You know, the grass is green, but never be painted Roses bloom, in places unknown Rivers run, but never get hold, I've got the love of Jesus, The love of Jesus in my soul.
